mapper.sql: -- select route_id, route_name, dept_id, deliver_time, status, create_time, last_modify_time from store_deliver_route select r.route_id, r.route_name, r.dept_id, r.deliver_time, r.status, r.create_time, r.last_modify_time,d.dept_name, count(srs.customer_id) as customer_count from store_deliver_route r left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id left join store_route_shop srs on r.route_id = srs.route_id
mapper.select:
select r.route_id, r.route_name, r.dept_id, r.deliver_time, r.status, r.create_time, r.last_modify_time,d.dept_name, count(srs.customer_id) as customer_count from store_deliver_route r left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id left join store_route_shop srs on r.route_id = srs.route_id
join ( select srs.route_id from store_route_shop srs join store_member sm on srs.customer_id = sm.id and (sm.nickname like concat('%', #{searchKey}, '%')) GROUP BY srs.route_id ) as ttt on ttt.route_id = r.route_id
and r.route_name like concat('%', #{routeName}, '%') and r.dept_id = #{deptId}
group by r.route_id
mapper.insert:
insert into store_deliver_route
route_name, dept_id, deliver_time, status, create_time, last_modify_time,
#{routeName}, #{deptId}, #{deliverTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{lastModifyTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from store_deliver_route where route_id in
#{routeId}
mapper.select:
select r.route_id, r.route_name, r.dept_id, d.dept_name,sm1.id as customerId, sm1.nickname as customerName from store_deliver_route r left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id left join store_route_shop srs on r.route_id = srs.route_id left join store_member sm1 on srs.customer_id = sm1.id
join ( select srs.route_id from store_route_shop srs join store_member sm on srs.customer_id = sm.id and (sm.nickname like concat('%', #{searchKey}, '%')) GROUP BY srs.route_id ) as ttt on ttt.route_id = r.route_id
and r.route_name like concat('%', #{routeName}, '%') and r.dept_id = #{deptId}
order by r.route_id asc
